theme: Light mode primary with High-Contrast Swiss Brutalism. Dark mode specific for coding editors and HR focus modes.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large headers. Never use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Clean and highly legible for long reading (job descriptions) and dense data (dashboards).

monospace.usage: Use for the code editor, AI risk scores, countdown timers, and technical HR data points.

rules: Color is used strictly for function (e.g., Red for proctoring violations, Blue for primary actions).

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E4E4E7 (zinc-200) for structural grid definition. Sharp, not soft.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Avoid diffuse soft shadows. Use sharp drop-shadows or 1px border translation for interactive states.
visual_enhancers.radius: Subtle roundness (max 4px to 8px). Avoid pill-shaped except for distinct tags/badges.

surfaces.header: Solid background with a hard bottom border. NO transparent headers.
surfaces.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift and shadow-sm.

marketing_careers.grid: Bento Grid (Mode A). Asymmetrical. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
marketing_careers.spacing: Generous. p-12 to p-24 for sections.

hr_dashboard.grid: High Density Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
hr_dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation + Topbar + F-Pattern content area. Place North Star metric (Pipeline Health/AI Score) in top-left.

proctored_exam.grid: Focus Mode. Centered max-w-4xl container. Top sticky bar for timer/webcam status.
proctored_exam.structure: Minimalist. No distracting sidebars. Full screen lock overlay before starting.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states on all buttons/cards (e.g., -translate-y-0.5, border color change).
motion.transitions: Use specific transition properties (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform) not 'all'.
motion.exam_alerts: Harsh, immediate snap animations for proctoring violations (Red screen flash).

components.buttons: Sharp corners or slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast. Primary uses #002FA7, secondary uses white bg with black border.
components.forms: Use Shadcn UI inputs/selects. Clear error states in Red.
components.data_tables: Shadcn UI table. Dense padding (py-2). Use monospace for IDs and scores.
components.tabs: Override Shadcn default h-9 with h-auto. Use for switching between MCQ, Short Answer, and Coding Challenge in the exam.
components.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog. Solid background. Used for Application details and snapshot review.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA minimums. Dark text on light backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-primary focus:ring-offset-2. Never disable outline without replacing it.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

icons.usage: Use crisp, standard weights. Use explicitly for functional meaning (e.g., AlertTriangle for violations, Clock for timer).

open_roles: Senior Product Manager (AI/ML, Intelligent Systems & Enterprise Innovation)
Director Global Sales (AI/ML, ADAS, Multimodal Data)

image_urls.description: Diverse tech team collaborating at a desk
Focused candidate taking an exam on a laptop

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Generate a multi-page app with React Router. Routes: /careers, /careers/:jobId, /careers/:jobId/apply, /exam/:inviteId, /hr/login, /hr/dashboard, /hr/jobs, /hr/applications.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: For the HR Dashboard, ensure a high-density, analytical view. Include a mock AI-generation risk score for written answers and a proctoring violation log.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: For the Proctored Exam page, implement UI elements that simulate fullscreen lock, disable copy/paste (via onCopy, onPaste events), and a visual webcam snapshot feed (mocked).
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Include a code editor layout for the coding challenge section (use a simple textarea with monospace font if Monaco is unavailable, but styled to look like an IDE).
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do not center align `.App` text. Use standard left alignment for readability.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Add `data-testid` to all forms, buttons, links, and major layout sections.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Use `sonner` for toast notifications (e.g., successful application, exam timer warnings, HR actions).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Make creative, distinctive frontends.
Do not use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but keep borders sharp as per Swiss Brutalism.
Do not apply universal transition (`transition: all`). Apply transitions to specific properties.
Do not center align the app container in index.css.
Use modern button styles relevant to the app style (sharp/slightly rounded, high contrast).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭) for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, focus rings).
Use generous spacing (2-3x typical) for marketing, but use high density for HR dashboards.
NEVER use placeholder image URLs. Use only the provided image_urls.
